detaileddescription.para: Default behaviour: Size negotiation is enabled & listens to Style Change signal, but doesn't receive event callbacks.

briefdescription.para: True if needs to support key navigation.
True if view should not use visuals.
Flags for the constructor.
AccessibilityDoGesture signal type.
AccessibilityAction signal type.
Total count of flags.
Pimpl body.
Called after the actor has been initialized.
Called when a key event is received.

simplesect.para: True if the event is consumed

briefdescription.para: Query if all resources required by a View are loaded and ready.

detaileddescription.para:
Most resources are only loaded when the View is placed on stage.
true if the resources are loaded and ready, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Returns whether this view acts as a layout container.

simplesect.para: True if this view has a LayoutManager attached

briefdescription.para: This method is called when the view is accessibility activated.

simplesect.para: true if this view can perform accessibility activation

briefdescription.para: Called when accessibility pan gesture is received.

simplesect.para: true if the pan gesture has been consumed by this view

briefdescription.para: Called for accessibility value change (e.g. slider up/down).

parameterdescription.para: Whether the value should be increased or decreased

simplesect.para: true if the value changed action has been consumed by this view

briefdescription.para: Called for accessibility zoom action.

simplesect.para: true if the zoom action has been consumed by this view

briefdescription.para: Creates a custom Accessible object for this view.

detaileddescription.para:
The AT-SPI infrastructure is responsible for destroying the returned object.
The newly created Accessible object
GetAccessibleObject()

briefdescription.para: Gets the next focusable actor in this view towards the given direction.

detaileddescription.para:
A view needs to override this function in order to support two dimensional key navigation.
currentFocusedActor
The current focused actor
direction
The direction to move the focus towards
loopEnabled
Whether the focus movement should be looped within the view
The next focusable actor in this view or an empty handle if no actor can be focused

briefdescription.para: Informs this view that its chosen focusable actor will be focused.
Called when the view has enter pressed on it.

simplesect.para: true if this view supported this action

briefdescription.para: Retrieves SourceActor of the OffScreenRenderable.

simplesect.para: SourceActor of the OffScreenRenderable.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves whether the OffScreen RenderTasks is exclusive or not.

simplesect.para: True if the RenderTask is exclusive.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the extension for this view.

simplesect.para: The extension if available, NULL otherwise

briefdescription.para: Second phase initialization.
Gets the current state of this View.

simplesect.para: The current ViewState (may contain multiple combined states)

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the view is enabled.

detaileddescription.para: A disabled view does not receive user interaction. Setting this to false adds the Disabled state and emits StateChangedSignal.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable, false to disable

briefdescription.para: Returns true if this view and all its View ancestors are enabled.

detaileddescription.para: Unlike IsEnabled(), which only reflects the view's own state, this method walks up the scene hierarchy and returns false if any ancestor View carries ViewState::DISABLED.

simplesect.para: True if neither the view nor any ancestor is disabled

briefdescription.para: Returns true if this view or any of its View ancestors is focused.

detaileddescription.para: Unlike the Focused bit in GetState(), this method walks up the scene hierarchy and returns true if any ancestor View carries ViewState::FOCUSED.

simplesect.para: True if the view itself or at least one ancestor is focused

briefdescription.para: Returns the state changed signal.

detaileddescription.para: Emitted whenever the view's ViewState changes.

simplesect.para: The StateChangedSignal

briefdescription.para: Registers a named state-change handler using a member function.

parameterdescription.para: Object whose member function will be called
Member function with signature void(View, const StateEvent&)

briefdescription.para: Registers a named state-change handler using a callable (e.g. lambda).

parameterdescription.para: Callable with signature void(View, const StateEvent&)

briefdescription.para: Removes a named state-change handler.

simplesect.para: True if a handler was found and removed

briefdescription.para: Removes a named state-change handler only if it is not currently being processed.

simplesect.para: True if removed, false if currently processing or not found

briefdescription.para: Updates a state bit in the view's ViewState and emits StateChangedSignal.

parameterdescription.para: The state to set or clear
True to add the state, false to remove it
Input event that triggered the change; leave default if programmatic

briefdescription.para: Notifies this view that its focus state has changed.

detaileddescription.para: Called by focus managers. Invokes the protected virtual OnFocusChanged() and emits the FocusChanged signal.

parameterdescription.para: True if the view gained focus, false if lost

briefdescription.para: Gets the x scale factor applied to the view.

simplesect.para: The x scale factor

briefdescription.para: Sets the x scale factor applied to the view.

parameterdescription.para: The X scale factor to set

briefdescription.para: Gets the y scale factor applied to the view.

simplesect.para: The y scale factor

briefdescription.para: Sets the y scale factor applied to the view.

parameterdescription.para: The Y scale factor to set

briefdescription.para: Checks if the view is visible.

simplesect.para: True if the view is visible, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Sets the visibility of the view.

parameterdescription.para: True to make the view visible, false to hide it

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the opacity of the view.

simplesect.para: The opacity value (0.0 to 1.0)

briefdescription.para: Sets the opacity of the view.

parameterdescription.para: The opacity value to set (0.0 to 1.0)

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the actual rendered size of this View after layout.

detaileddescription.para: This is a read-only result of the layout system's Measure/Arrange passes. To set the desired size, use SetRequestedWidth() / SetRequestedHeight().

simplesect.para: The actual size (width, height) as set by the layout system

briefdescription.para: Gets the X position of the View.

simplesect.para: The X position of the View

briefdescription.para: Sets the X position of the View.
Gets the Y position of the View.

simplesect.para: The Y position of the View

briefdescription.para: Sets the Y position of the View.
Gets the parent origin of the View.

simplesect.para: The parent origin of the View

briefdescription.para: Sets the parent origin of the View.
Gets the pivot of the View.

simplesect.para: The pivot of the View

briefdescription.para: Sets the pivot of the View.
Gets whether the actor should be focusable by keyboard navigation.

simplesect.para: True if it is focusable

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the actor should be focusable by keyboard navigation.
Gets whether the actor should be focused when touched.

simplesect.para: True if it is focused when touched

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the actor should be focused when touched.

parameterdescription.para: True if it gets focused when touched

briefdescription.para: Gets the background color.

simplesect.para: The background color

briefdescription.para: Sets the background color.

detaileddescription.para: If the UiColor has a color ID, it is resolved from the current theme and a binding is registered so the color is automatically refreshed when the theme changes.
If the UiColor has direct RGBA values, it is applied immediately and any previous ID-based binding for this property is removed.

briefdescription.para: Gets the corner radius of the view.

simplesect.para: The corner radius as Vector4 (topLeft, topRight, bottomRight, bottomLeft)

briefdescription.para: Sets a uniform corner radius for all four corners.

parameterdescription.para: The corner radius to apply to all corners

briefdescription.para: Gets the corner radius policy.

simplesect.para: The corner radius policy

briefdescription.para: Sets the corner radius policy.

parameterdescription.para: ABSOLUTE for world-unit values (default), RELATIVE for percentage [0.0, 0.5] of the shorter side

briefdescription.para: Gets the corner squareness of the view.

simplesect.para: The corner squareness as Vector4 (x=topLeft, y=topRight, z=bottomRight, w=bottomLeft)

briefdescription.para: Sets a uniform corner squareness for all four corners.

parameterdescription.para: The squareness value to apply to all corners

briefdescription.para: Gets the borderline width of the view.

simplesect.para: The borderline width

briefdescription.para: Sets the borderline width of the view.
Gets the borderline color of the view.

simplesect.para: The borderline color

briefdescription.para: Sets the borderline color of the view.

detaileddescription.para: If the UiColor has a color ID, it is resolved from the current theme and a binding is registered so the color is automatically refreshed when the theme changes.

briefdescription.para: Gets the borderline offset of the view.

simplesect.para: The borderline offset

briefdescription.para: Sets the borderline offset of the view.
Gets the name of the view.

simplesect.para: The name

briefdescription.para: Sets the name of this view.
Sets the background with a property map.
Clears the background.
Sets RenderEffect to this View.

simplesect.para: Every effect inherits RenderEffect.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves View's render effect.

simplesect.para: RenderEffect set on this View

briefdescription.para: Clears RenderEffect of this View, if exists.
Ensures this View has an interaction trait and returns it.

detaileddescription.para: If no interaction trait is set, an InteractiveTrait is attached and returned. If an InteractiveTrait is already attached, it is returned. If a different interaction trait is set, an assertion may fire and an empty handle is returned.

simplesect.para: InteractiveTrait handle, or an uninitialized handle on error

briefdescription.para: Returns whether this View has an interaction trait attached.

simplesect.para: True if this View has an InteractiveTrait

briefdescription.para: Ensures this View has a selectable trait and returns it.

detaileddescription.para: If no selectable trait is set, a SelectableTrait is attached and returned. If a SelectableTrait is already attached, it is returned. If a different selectable trait type is set, an assertion may fire and an empty handle is returned.

simplesect.para: SelectableTrait handle, or an uninitialized handle on error

briefdescription.para: Returns whether this View has a selectable trait attached.

simplesect.para: True if this View has a SelectableTrait

briefdescription.para: Sets an interaction effect on this view.

detaileddescription.para: The effect is applied when the view becomes interactive (via AsInteractive()). If the view is already interactive, the effect is applied immediately.
The effect is frozen at set time — subsequent modifications to the original handle do not affect this view. Pass Trait{} to remove the current effect.
If this method is called before AsInteractive(), the explicitly set effect takes priority over the UiConfig default.

parameterdescription.para: A Trait implementing InteractionEffectInterface, or Trait{} to remove

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for method chaining

briefdescription.para: Measures the view with the given constraints.

detaileddescription.para: This method implements caching to avoid redundant calculations. It calls OnMeasure internally (Template Method pattern).

simplesect.para: The measured size

briefdescription.para: Arranges the view within the given bounds.

detaileddescription.para: This method calls OnArrange internally (Template Method pattern).

parameterdescription.para: The bounds to arrange the view in

simplesect.para: The final arranged size

briefdescription.para: Invalidates the measure of this view.

detaileddescription.para: This propagates to the parent layout while one exists, until the layout root is reached (no parent Layout).

briefdescription.para: Invalidates the arrange of this view.
Gets the measured size from the last Measure() pass.

simplesect.para: The measured size

briefdescription.para: Sets the requested width.

detaileddescription.para: A positive value sets a fixed width. WRAP_CONTENT (-1): sizes to content (default). MATCH_PARENT (-2): fills the parent container.

briefdescription.para: Gets the requested width.

simplesect.para: The requested width

briefdescription.para: Sets the requested height.

detaileddescription.para: A positive value sets a fixed height. WRAP_CONTENT (-1): sizes to content (default). MATCH_PARENT (-2): fills the parent container.

briefdescription.para: Gets the requested height.

simplesect.para: The requested height

briefdescription.para: Sets the minimum width.
Gets the minimum width.

simplesect.para: The minimum width

briefdescription.para: Sets the minimum height.
Gets the minimum height.

simplesect.para: The minimum height

briefdescription.para: Sets the maximum width.
Gets the maximum width.

simplesect.para: The maximum width

briefdescription.para: Sets the maximum height.
Gets the maximum height.

simplesect.para: The maximum height

briefdescription.para: Sets layout parameters on this View.

detaileddescription.para: The params handle is stored on the View as-is, and the View's measure cache is invalidated.

parameterdescription.para: The layout parameters to attach to this View

simplesect.para: Reference to this View for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Retrieves a layout params trait by LayoutParamsType.

simplesect.para: The layout params handle

briefdescription.para: Sets the view margin.
Gets the view margin.

simplesect.para: The view margin

briefdescription.para: Sets the view padding.
Gets the view padding.

simplesect.para: The view padding

briefdescription.para: Sets the layout mode of this View.

detaileddescription.para: LayoutMode::DEFAULT (default) lets the parent container's layout system manage this View's size and position normally.

LayoutMode::STANDALONE excludes this View from the parent's accumulation, spacing and index calculations. The View's size is still measured normally (so MATCH_PARENT, WRAP_CONTENT and explicit RequestedWidth/Height all work), but its position is taken from SetPositionX/SetPositionY instead of being decided by the parent layout. This is useful for floating overlays, drag previews, tooltips and absolute positioning inside any LayoutManager.

Standalone children ignore the parent's padding entirely. Their measured size is the parent's full inner size minus the child's own margin, and their final position is SetPositionX/SetPositionY plus the child's own margin in the parent's coordinate space. This keeps size and position consistent: a Standalone child with MATCH_PARENT fills the parent edge to edge regardless of parent padding, and any margin set on the child shifts it inward in both axes.

briefdescription.para: Gets the layout mode of this View.

simplesect.para: The layout mode

briefdescription.para: Convenience: returns true if LayoutMode is Standalone.

simplesect.para: True if the view's layout mode is Standalone

briefdescription.para: Gets the parent layout of this view, if any.

simplesect.para: The parent Layout handle, or empty if none

briefdescription.para: Gets the parent view in the layout hierarchy.

simplesect.para: The parent View handle, or empty if none

briefdescription.para: Sets a custom measure callback for this View.

detaileddescription.para: When set, the callback replaces the default measurement behavior during the layout pass. Pass a default-constructed callback to remove.

briefdescription.para: Sets a custom arrange callback for this View.

detaileddescription.para: When set, the callback replaces the default arrangement behavior during the layout pass. Pass a default-constructed callback to remove.

briefdescription.para: Inserts a child at the specified index.
Removes all children from this View.
Gets the number of child views.

simplesect.para: The child count

briefdescription.para: Gets the child view at the specified index.

simplesect.para: The child view at the index

briefdescription.para: Returns the index of the given child view, or -1 if not found.

simplesect.para: Index of the view, or -1 if not a child

briefdescription.para: Raises this view one step above its immediate next sibling in the parent's children list.

parameterdescription.para: UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.

briefdescription.para: Lowers this view one step below its immediate previous sibling in the parent's children list.

parameterdescription.para: UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.

briefdescription.para: Raises this view to the top of its sibling list.

parameterdescription.para: UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.

briefdescription.para: Lowers this view to the bottom of its sibling list.

parameterdescription.para: UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.

briefdescription.para: Raises this view above the given target sibling.

parameterdescription.para: The target sibling view to raise above.
UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.
The target view is a sibling.

briefdescription.para: Lowers this view below the given target sibling.

parameterdescription.para: The target sibling view to lower below.
UPDATE also reorders the parent layout's children; PRESERVE keeps layout order unchanged and affects only visual z-order.

simplesect.para: The View has been parented.
The target view is a sibling.

briefdescription.para: Gets the children container for layout manager access.

simplesect.para: Reference to the children container

briefdescription.para: Gets the children container for layout manager access.

simplesect.para: Reference to the children container

briefdescription.para: Gets the Accessible object that represents this view.

simplesect.para: The Accessible object

briefdescription.para: Gets the accessibility relations of this view.

simplesect.para: The list of accessibility relations

briefdescription.para: Sets whether this view supports two dimensional key navigation.
Gets whether this view supports two dimensional key navigation.

simplesect.para: True if key navigation is supported

briefdescription.para: Sets this view to receive key input focus.
Checks whether this view has key input focus.

simplesect.para: True if the view has key input focus

briefdescription.para: Clears key input focus from this view.
Sets whether this view acts as a focus group boundary.

parameterdescription.para: True to set as focus group

briefdescription.para: Gets whether this view acts as a focus group boundary.

simplesect.para: True if the view is a focus group

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when key event is received.

detaileddescription.para:
A callback of the following type may be connected: boolYourCallbackName(Viewview,constKeyEvent&event);
 The return value of True, indicates that the event should be consumed. Otherwise the signal will be emitted on the next parent of the actor. 
The signal to connect to 


The View has been initialized.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when the view gets or loses focus.
Checks whether the view is connected to the scene.

simplesect.para: true if the view is on scene, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the internal data implementation of the view.

simplesect.para: Reference to the internal data implementation

briefdescription.para: Creates a new View.
Destructor. A reference counted object may only be deleted by calling Unreference().
Called during measure pass. Override to implement custom measurement.
Called during arrange pass. Override to implement custom arrangement.
Called when the view's focus state changes. Override to add custom focus handling. Call the base class at the end of the override to preserve default state management.

parameterdescription.para: True if the view gained focus, false if lost

briefdescription.para: Default constructor.
Constructor with behaviour flags.
Gets texture output of offscreen rendering.

simplesect.para: The offscreen rendering output texture
Valid only inside OffScreenRenderingFinishedSignal() with RENDER_ONCE type.

briefdescription.para: Marks this view's resources as ready (does not request relayout).

memberdef.argsstring: (StringView bindingId, const UiColor &color, T *inst, void(T::*setter)(const Vector4 &))
memberdef.name: SetColorBinding

briefdescription.para: Registers a color binding for theme-aware color updates.

parameterdescription.para: Type of the instance (ViewImpl or a derived class)
The object whose setter will be used as the callback
Member function called both immediately and on theme change

briefdescription.para: Gets the measure callback, if set.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the MeasureCallback, or nullptr if not set

briefdescription.para: Gets the arrange callback, if set.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the ArrangeCallback, or nullptr if not set

briefdescription.para: This is the internal implementation class for View.

detaileddescription.para: ViewImpl extends CustomActorImpl to provide basic UI functionality. It implements the p-impl pattern and provides the actual implementation for the View public API.
View can optionally have a LayoutManager to manage child layout. When a LayoutManager is set, the View can manage children and delegate layout calculations to the LayoutManager.
